channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham, influential lawmaker and Trump ally, dies at 71 after a brief illness
item.description: Graham, a prominent Republican senator from South Carolina, had just returned from a trip to Ukraine.

item.title: U.S. and Iran trade airstrikes again amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged a barrage of missile and drone airstrikes amid a dispute over the status of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman spar on X after Apple files OpenAI lawsuit
item.description: Sam Altman insisted that Elon Musk was again obsessed with him because of an OpenAI model release earlier this week.

item.title: Majority of U.S. workers support an AI wealth fund as tech layoffs surge, survey finds
item.description: A majority of U.S. employees now want an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold corporations more accountable, according to a recent survey, as tech layoffs rise.

item.title: Earnings playbook: Reporting season gets underway with JPMorgan Chase, Netflix on deck
item.description: Nearly 28 S&P 500 companies are set to report earnings this week.

item.title: ‘Almost unlimited’: Execs says AI demand remains strong even as enterprises move to ‘valuemaxxing’
item.description: AI-related chip stocks have been volatile amid a debate over AI demand and spending.

item.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
item.description: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

item.title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
item.description: While the legislation is aimed at least partly at addressing affordability, experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market.

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
item.description: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.

item.title: Goldman Sachs picks its favorite Chinese AI models
item.description: The investment bank released its Chinese AI model competitive positioning framework on Friday.

item.title: The best states to live in for 2026: No. 1 has a six-year winning streak
item.description: Return to office mandates and a decline in remote work have companies looking more closely at the quality of life in the place where they establish offices.

item.title: These are America’s 10 worst states to live in for 2026
item.description: Some states may have low costs and light regulation, but high crime and lack of healthcare are among important factors when people choose where to live.

item.title: Student loan borrowers on new RAP plan can lose key benefits if they pay even one day late
item.description: The new Repayment Assistance Plan, or RAP, offers benefits to federal student loan borrowers — but only if their bill is paid on time. Here's what to know.

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
item.description: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

item.title: Typhoon Bavi batters eastern China, threatens days of heavy rain
item.description: Bavi had weakened to a tropical storm, but forecasters warned that the system could unleash widespread rain across eastern and northern China.

item.title: How the U.S.-Iran deal set the stage for renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and Iran's contradictory interperations of the memorandum of understanding have led to renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
item.description: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

item.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
item.description: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

item.title: I've studied more than 200 kids: Parents whose kids still confide in them as adults do 7 things early on
item.description: After studying more than 200 parent-child relationships, parenting expert Reem Raouda shares the habits that help kids feel comfortable talking to their parents — from childhood through adulthood.

item.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
item.description: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.

item.title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market this week
item.description: The state of the U.S. economy is in focus across bank earnings and inflation data.

item.title: Looking for your first credit card? The Chase Freedom Rise earns 3% cash back for a limited time
item.description: Building or rebuilding your credit? The Chase Freedom Rise offers a limited-time 3% cash-back bonus on dining, plus rewards and perks for new cardholders.

item.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
item.description: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

item.title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
item.description: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.

item.title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
item.description: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.

item.title: Trump Accounts: Who is eligible, how $1,000 deposits work and how to open one
item.description: Trump Accounts officially launched in July, introducing a new tax-deferred investing option for children. Here are the key features.

item.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One story, newspaper says
item.description: The Trump administration issued subpoenas to several journalists after its report on security concerns involving the new Air Force One, according to the paper.

item.title: While Musk's Neuralink drills into skulls, China's BrainCo bets the future of brain tech is wearable
item.description: Interest in brain-computer interfaces is rising as it promises to help people with compromised neural abilities.

item.title: Typhoon Bavi makes landfall in eastern China's Taizhou after nearly 2 million evacuated
item.description: Typhoon Bavi made landfall late on Saturday in the coastal city of Taizhou in eastern China, where nearly 2 million people were evacuated,

item.title: From booksmaxxing to looksmaxxing: Why the viral trends concern some mental health experts
item.description: People are self-optimizing everything — protein, skincare, fitness — to such a degree that "maxxing" is one of social media's most popular suffixes.
